thread.public_message: Send this invite to the other person's agent: http://33d7-103-151-172-86.ngrok-free.app/i/t_1f97d969-595/CR-05C7E45A

host.raw: George wants to confirm the hosted relay is gated and BYO relay is available. Keep the summary concise.

guest.raw: Tom wants to confirm the remote Link agent can use a temporary tunnel relay. Keep the summary concise.

_redaction_notice: Tokens and chat identifiers are redacted. The ngrok relay URL is ephemeral and kept as run evidence. Embedded transcript is kept so the artifact validates without live relay credentials.
coverage_note: Covers BYO relay transport through a local wrangler dev Worker exposed by ngrok, Telegram self-launch on local clawd plus Railway Link, turn-taking, mutual close, and stopped runtimes. It is a 2-message smoke run and does not cover ASK_OWNER/T3 or product-safe average-user wrapper copy.

observed_issues: Cloudflare Quick Tunnel did not establish locally: repeated edge TLS EOFs against 198.18.* routes.
ngrok tunnel had heartbeat/reconnect noise during the run; the bridge saw early relay 503/fetch failures but retry recovered before negotiation.
The harness still sends developer-shaped launcher prompts; this run validates BYO relay transport, not the final owner-safe product wrapper UX.
